article.title: artificial intelligence (AI)
article.p: artificial intelligence (AI), the ability of a digital computer or computer-controlled robot to perform tasks commonly associated with intelligent beings. The term is frequently applied to the project of developing systems endowed with the intellectual processes characteristic of humans, such as the ability to reason, discover meaning, generalize, or learn from past experience. Since their development in the 1940s, digital computers have been programmed to carry out very complex tasksÔÇösuch as discovering proofs for mathematical theorems or playing chessÔÇöwith great proficiency. Despite continuing advances in computer processing speed and memory capacity, there are as yet no programs that
